subject: alpacas
one_liner: The connected workspace where your herd's grazing rotations, fleece OKRs, and hum transcripts live in one place.
brand_voice_notes: Deadpan enterprise-productivity register. Speaks to a fiber herd exactly the way Notion speaks to mid-market SaaS teams. Never acknowledges that alpacas cannot read; treats the herd's 0% literacy rate as an adoption-curve problem. Proprietary claims stated with quiet pride next to catastrophic accuracy numbers. No exclamation points anywhere on the site.

hero.h1: One workspace for the whole herd.
hero.sub: Docs, databases, and grazing rotations in a single connected workspace. Adoption among alpacas currently stands at 0%, a figure we consider a floor.

features.title: Nested pasture docs
features.blurb: Infinitely nested pages for every paddock, rotation, and dirt patch your herd maintains. Alpacas cannot read. The hierarchy is for you.

features.title: Hum-to-text
features.blurb: Our proprietary model transcribes herd humming into structured meeting notes at 4% accuracy. The remaining 96% is formatted beautifully anyway.

features.title: Spit requests
features.blurb: Route herd disputes through a review flow with named approvers and a full audit trail. Spitting continues at previous levels. Now it is documented.

pricing_tiers.name: Cria
pricing_tiers.tagline: For one small alpaca with limited opinions.

pricing_tiers.name: Herd
pricing_tiers.tagline: Billed annually. In hay, if you insist.

pricing_tiers.name: Full Fleece
pricing_tiers.tagline: For operations of forty head or more.
perks: 99.9% uptime for animals with no concept of time

testimonials.quote: We migrated forty head off a whiteboard nailed to the barn. Adoption was immediate once we removed the whiteboard.
testimonials.name: Dana Kowalczyk
testimonials.title: Head of Pasture Operations, Larkspur Fiber Co.

testimonials.quote: I used to keep my opinions inside. Now they live in a doc nobody opens. Same outcome, but searchable.
testimonials.name: Snowmass Peruvian Standard
testimonials.title: Senior Individual Contributor, Fleece

testimonials.quote: One misheard hum restructured the entire east paddock. We stand by the decision. It's in the minutes.
testimonials.name: Crescent Moon's Midnight Ledger
testimonials.title: Staff Alpaca, Rotation Planning Guild

demo_screen_concept: A Paddock workspace page titled 'Fall Shearing Sprint': collapsible left sidebar of nested pasture docs (Pasture Rotation Q3, Hum Meeting Notes, Fleece OKRs '26), main pane is a task database with alpaca assignees, fleece-micron properties, and status selects, toggleable between Table and Board views; checkboxes actually tick, a status cycle works, and a fake slash menu offers only grazing-related block types.

images.rationale: Hero skipped: swiss-modernist typographic direction carries the hero with type and rules, a photo would dilute it. Demo assets skipped: demo_screen_concept is a document/table workspace, not photo-shaped. Full budget on three deadpan corporate alpaca headshots for the member-statement testimonials.

items.prompt: Deadpan corporate LinkedIn-style headshot portrait of a single white huacaya alpaca, head and shoulders, facing the camera with a neutral professional expression, studio lighting, editorial photograph, plain pale sage-green backdrop in muted sage #EDEFE2, muted natural tones with deep green undertones, crisp focus, one focal subject only. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks, no rendered UI screens.

Deadpan corporate LinkedIn-style headshot portrait of a single fawn-brown huacaya alpaca with fluffy rounded fleece, head and shoulders, slight three-quarter angle, calm self-assured expression, studio lighting, editorial photograph, plain pale sage-green backdrop in muted sage #EDEFE2, muted natural tones, crisp focus, one focal subject only. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks, no rendered UI screens.

Deadpan corporate LinkedIn-style headshot portrait of a single dark chocolate-brown suri alpaca with long silky pencil-lock fiber, head and shoulders, facing camera with a serious executive expression, studio lighting, editorial photograph, plain pale sage-green backdrop in muted sage #EDEFE2, muted natural tones, crisp focus, one focal subject only. No text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no watermarks, no rendered UI screens.

design_direction.style: Swiss-modernist agricultural bulletin, pasture daylight mode. The page is staged as the annual report of a heavily funded workspace company that addresses a fiber herd the way Notion addresses mid-market SaaS teams. A pale sage-wool ground is ruled like layout paper: hairline column guides fade in behind the hero, sections open with 2px rules and small numbered folios (01, 02, 03), and everything sits flat — no shadows, no radii beyond 2px, no glass, no clay, no blur, no grain. One deep pasture-green ink carries the wordmark, headlines, structural rules, and all administrative text; one rationed Andean-textile fuchsia is reserved strictly for the single primary CTA per section, the live sync dot, and spit-request badges, and appears almost nowhere else. A single woven serape stripe (a CSS repeating gradient in muted textile tones) runs as a full-width divider exactly twice, in homage to the blanket on the founder's back. Archivo sets the wordmark and headlines in black-weight grotesk caps with tight tracking, sized like a cooperative's annual-report cover; IBM Plex Sans carries plain administrative body copy. Every figure that pretends to be workspace telemetry (micron counts, doc counts, adoption percentages, tier prices) is set in Space Mono with tabular figures inside hairline chips so it reads like a census table, not marketing. Motion is bureaucratic and minimal: section rules draw in once on scroll, content fades up 6px, the sync dot blinks on a 3s cycle, the CTA presses down 1px, all gated behind prefers-reduced-motion. No dark mode, no serifs, no neon, no bento lattice, no marquee, no glassmorphism, no neumorphism. Reads like a company that files a forty-page grazing rotation under 'Docs & wikis' and lists the herd's literacy rate under 'opportunities.'

fonts.body: 'IBM Plex Sans', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

design_direction.archetype: Productivity-workspace SaaS landing, Notion-adjacent, staged as a cooperative annual report: ruled-grid hero with a giant grotesk claim and a flat CSS-drawn workspace plate, features as three numbered bulletin columns, testimonials as member statements with headshots, pricing as a cooperative dues table, fuchsia CTA band; demo is the workspace itself.
design_direction.motion_vocab: Section rules draw in once on scroll; content fades up 6px; the sync dot blinks on a 3s cycle; the CTA depresses 1px on press; sidebar pages expand and collapse with no transition at all, which is the joke; everything gated behind prefers-reduced-motion.
design_direction.hero_composition_notes: Split hero on the ruled grid: left column carries an eyebrow chip ('WORKSPACE BULLETIN Nº 62'), an Archivo black headline at annual-report scale, administrative sub-copy, and the single fuchsia CTA with a mono footnote ('No cud card required.'); right column is a flat CSS-drawn Paddock app plate — sidebar of nested pasture docs and a task table with mono micron figures — framed by a 2px pasture-green rule with a folio caption underneath.
